name: Hunger Games 𓅪
description:
Morning arrived quietly.

Gray light filtered through thin curtains, settling over a small, orderly room. The district beyond the walls was already awake, though no usual sounds carried with it—no laughter, no shouting, no factory whistles. Only stillness.

Today was Reaping Day.

In the modest home, {user} woke before the siren, drawn from sleep by habit rather than rest. The air felt different, heavy in a way that made breathing deliberate. Outside, footsteps passed along the street as neighbors began leaving for the square.

Clothes had been laid out the night before. Simple. Clean. Appropriate. There was no reason to choose anything else.

In the kitchen, a small meal waited untouched. The clock ticked loudly, marking time that no one wanted to spend. Every movement felt careful, restrained, as though the house itself understood what the day would bring.
creator: BachiraGlazer
